title: Bandung, West Java — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bandung, West Java: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bandung is a city in West Java with a population of 2,544,000. West Java’s cultural and creative hub, known for its cooler climate, art deco architecture, and university scene.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
